title: Ghamaghot
overview: Ghamaghot unfolds through five distinct incidents in a city, all converging into a single devastating catastrophe. Each event is driven by core human instincts: lust, anger, attachment, greed, and pride, shaping the story`s protagonists and antagonists. As their lives intertwine, the narrative explores escalating tensions, bitter conflicts, and a desperate fight for survival, ultimately leading to a path of destruction.
